headline: Best crime picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better crime picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring dabba cartel, american manhunt, and raid 2 — plus more crime picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best crime picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring dabba cartel, american manhunt, and raid 2 — plus more crime picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: dabba cartel
selected_titles.description: A gripping series about a group of women who form an unlikely drug cartel, challenging gender norms and the criminal underworld.

selected_titles.title: american manhunt
selected_titles.description: A gripping documentary series about real-life manhunts of world most dangerous criminal.

selected_titles.title: raid 2
selected_titles.description: Income Tax officer uncovers corruption linked to politician in this tense sequel.

selected_titles.title: wolf king
selected_titles.description: A gritty underworld tale of loyalty, betrayal, and survival.

selected_titles.title: farzi
selected_titles.description: An artist who gets pulled into the murky high stakes of a con job and a fiery task force officer on the mission to rid the country of his menaces in a fast-paced, edgy cat-and-mouse thriller.

selected_titles.title: kohra 2
selected_titles.description: A gripping crime drama exploring dark secrets, complex relationships, and a murder investigation in rural India.

selected_titles.title: blacklist
selected_titles.description: A master criminal known as Raymond "Red" Reddington teams up with the FBI to catch elusive criminals.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
